financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it keeps growing and making smart investments in new technology.
It manages its money wisely, which helps it stay strong and ready for future opportunities.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company faces strong competition and global challenges, which could affect its ability to keep clients and grow.
HCLTech is trying to reduce risks by spreading its operations worldwide and adapting to new technologies.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its operations responsibly.
They are also good at treating people fairly, but there's still room for improvement in social aspects.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company uses very little borrowed money, which makes it financially stable and less risky.
It has plenty of cash on hand to pay its bills and keep operations running smoothly.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains its goals and how it's doing, making it easy for investors to understand their plans and progress.
They've made smart changes to save money and increase revenue, showing they are managing their resources well.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: HCL Technologies has a clear plan with specific goals, especially in AI and digital areas, which helps them grow steadily.
They face some challenges like merging new companies and finding skilled workers, but their strategy is strong and follows industry trends.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: HCL Technologies is doing well because it's using new technologies like AI to improve and grow its business.
The company is making smart financial decisions and getting new deals, but there are some risks they need to watch closely.
